calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-16-2004 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-16-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: ALAN HORWITZ FOR PLAINTIFF PF 2001, LLC
DEFENDANT VICTOR JOSHI IN PRO PER

THIS CAUSE CAME ON REGULARLY FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE THIS DAY. BOTH PARTIES WERE PRESENT AS INDICATED ABOVE. TERMS OF SETTLEMENT WERE READ AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT TO REMAIN IN POSSESSION OF THE RENTAL UNIT IF $500.00O IS PAID ON OR BEFORE DECEMBER 31, 2004. THEREAFTER, DEFENDANT IS REQUIRED TO PAY THE SUM OF $1,933.33 ON THE FIRST DAY OF EACH MONTH STARTING JANUARY 2005 TO JUNE 2005. PAYMENT SHALL BE MADE IN FORMS OF CASHIER'S CHECK OR MONEY ORDER. DEFENDANT WILL NOTIFY FOX PLAZA WHEN FINAL PAYMENT IS COMPLETED WHICH IS IN JUNE 2005. UPON COMPLETION OF PAYMENT, A DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE WILL BE FILED. ANY AMOUNTS OWING BY DEFENDANT SHALL THEN BE WAIVED. IF DEFENDANT FAILS TO COMPLY, PLAINTIFF MAY SEEK AN EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR JUDGMENT OF RESTITUTION / POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES.

JPT STEVE TAXMAN, CLERK CLARK BANAYAD, REPORTER JOANN BRYCE (218)

payments.description: FIRST FILING UD COMPLT LESS THAN 2,500
